title: Connect more than 60 Portfolios to Board
excerpt:
Hello, 
Is it possible to connect more than 60 portfolios in a board for Enterprise plan? Will the projects inside the portfolio be counted as an item linkage or a connected board? TYI

posts.author: HDuong (Hannah Duong)
